heading: Omitted
label: 631 to 633 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 631 to 633, relating to Territory of Hawaii, were omitted in view of admission of Hawaii into the Union.Section 631, , , made provision for vesting of judicial power in courts and continued in force the courts’ jurisdiction and procedure previously in force.act Apr. 30, 1900, ch. 339, § 8131 Stat. 157Section 632, acts , ; , , set out size and organization of supreme court, appointment and qualifications of its members, and provisions for filling of vacancies therein.Apr. 30, 1900, ch. 339, § 8231 Stat. 157June 15, 1950, ch. 25064 Stat. 216Section 633, acts , ; , ; , ; , , called for presidential appointment of members of supreme court and circuit courts and set tenure and qualifications of judges.Apr. 30, 1900, ch. 339, § 8031 Stat. 156Mar. 3, 1905, ch. 1465, § 233 Stat. 1035July 9, 1921, ch. 42, § 31242 Stat. 119May 9, 1956, ch. 237, § 170 Stat. 130
